messages.say: How SQL works as DML explain

SQL (Structured Query Language) DML (Data Manipulation Language) ka part data ko modify karne ke liye use hota hai jo kisi database ke tables mein already stored hota hai. Iska kaam hota hai:



🔹 DML ka Full Form: Data Manipulation Language


DML SQL ke wo commands hoti hain jo:


Data ko insert karte hain

Data ko update karte hain

Data ko delete karte hain

Data ko retrieve (fetch) karte hain



✅ Basic DML Commands in SQL


1. INSERT – Data Add Karna


Yeh command table mein naye records (rows) add karne ke liye use hoti hai.


INSERT INTO Students (ID, Name, Age)
VALUES (1, 'Ali', 20);


👉 Is command ne Students table mein ek new student ka record add kiya.



2. SELECT – Data Retrieve Karna


Yeh command table se data fetch karne ke liye use hoti hai.


SELECT * FROM Students;


👉 Yeh command Students table ka poora data show karegi.


SELECT Name, Age FROM Students WHERE Age > 18;


👉 Yeh command un students ke names aur ages ko fetch karegi jinki age 18 se zyada hai.



3. UPDATE – Data Change Karna


Yeh command existing data ko modify karne ke liye hoti hai.


UPDATE Students
SET Age = 21
WHERE ID = 1;


👉 Is command ne student jiska ID 1 tha, uski age ko 21 kar diya.



4. DELETE – Data Remove Karna


Yeh command kisi record ko table se delete karne ke liye hoti hai.


DELETE FROM Students
WHERE ID = 1;


👉 Is command ne student jiska ID 1 tha, uska record delete kar diya.



🔁 Summary Table:

Command
Purpose
Example
INSERT
Naya record add karna
INSERT INTO ...
SELECT
Data fetch karna
SELECT * FROM ...
UPDATE
Existing record change karna
UPDATE ... SET ...
DELETE
Record delete karna
DELETE FROM ...


📌 Important Notes:


DML queries database ke data ko manipulate karti hain, schema ko nahi.

In commands ka effect temporary hota hai jab tak COMMIT nahi hota (in transactional DBs).

SELECT command technically DQL (Data Query Language) ka part hai, lekin DML ka extended part mana jata hai.



Agar aap chahen to mein in commands ka visual flow diagram ya practical example table bhi bana sakta hoon.

✅ Brief Explanation: How SQL works as DML


DML (Data Manipulation Language) SQL ka wo part hai jo database ke data ke upar kaam karta hai — data ko insert, retrieve, update, aur delete karta hai.



🔹 1. INSERT


New record ko table mein add karta hai.


INSERT INTO Students (ID, Name) VALUES (1, 'Ali');



🔹 2. SELECT


Table se data ko read (retrieve) karta hai.


SELECT * FROM Students;



🔹 3. UPDATE


Existing record ke data ko change karta hai.


UPDATE Students SET Name = 'Ahmed' WHERE ID = 1;



🔹 4. DELETE


Record ko table se remove karta hai.


DELETE FROM Students WHERE ID = 1;



📌 Summary:


SQL DML ka use database ke andar ke data ko modify karne ke liye hota hai — add, read, change, ya delete karne ke liye.


Agar aapko har command ka chhota real-life example chahiye to bataiye.

Got it! Here's a brief but meaningful explanation of how SQL works as DML:



💡 SQL as DML (Data Manipulation Language)


SQL DML un commands ka group hai jo database ke existing data ko manipulate karte hain — jaise data ko insert, read, update, aur delete karna.



✴️ DML Commands:

Command
Kaam
INSERT
Naya data add karta hai
SELECT
Data read ya fetch karta hai
UPDATE
Existing data ko change karta hai
DELETE
Data ko remove karta hai


Example:
Agar aap Students table mein data add karna, dekhna, change karna ya hataana chahte hain, to DML commands use hongi.



Yeh commands data pe kaam karti hain, table ke structure pe nahi.
